hooks.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.cwd // ""' | xargs basename 2>/dev/null); t=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.transcript_path // ""'); p=$(jq -rs 'first(.[] | select(.type=="user") | .message.content | select(type=="string") | select(test("^<(command-|local-command-)") | not)) // "" | gsub("[\n\r\t]+";" ")' "$t" 2>/dev/null); notify -t "Claude Code: ${dir:-session}" -s "Action required" "${p:-no prompt}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

input=$(cat); dir=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.cwd // ""' | xargs basename 2>/dev/null); msg=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.message // "Action required"'); t=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.transcript_path // ""'); p=$(jq -rs 'first(.[] | select(.type=="user") | .message.content | select(type=="string") | select(test("^<(command-|local-command-)") | not)) // "" | gsub("[\n\r\t]+";" ")' "$t" 2>/dev/null); notify -t "Claude Code: ${dir:-session}" -s "$msg" "${p:-no prompt}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
